title: We made an Audio ML sharing platform
abstract: Hey everyone we recently built a platform for people to share their audio ml creations and we are hoping to create it so people in the community can find  demos  of their models and eventually monetize their trained models. We are a team of small creators who are trying to improve the space for open
abstract_zh: 大家好，我们最近建立了一个平台，让人们分享他们的音频机器学习创作。我们希望社区成员可以找到模型的演示，并最终商业化他们训练好的模型。我们是一群小创作者，致力于改善开放空间。
